/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libmj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/mj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/mj_interfaces/msg/detail/ip_interface__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/mj_interfaces/srv/detail/torque_srv__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wyp/test/robot_learning/week2/test_week2_ws/build/mj_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmj_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
